tldr_zh: OpenAI延遲GPT-5.6發布、AI代理應用加速、芯片成本推升設備價格成今日科技焦點。
tldr_en: OpenAI delays GPT-5.6, AI agents transform enterprise operations, and chip costs drive device price hikes.

items.title_zh: OpenAI應白宮要求延遲GPT-5.6發布時程
items.title_en: OpenAI Delays GPT-5.6 Release After Trump Administration Request
items.summary_zh: OpenAI執行長Sam Altman表示，公司將按照川普政府要求，採取分階段方式發布新模型GPT-5.6，先限制性提供給少數合作夥伴，而非直接向公眾開放。白宮因安全疑慮要求此舉，反映政府對先進AI模型的謹慎態度。
items.summary_en: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6's public release, offering limited preview access to select partners instead. The Trump administration requested the gradual rollout citing security concerns, reflecting heightened government scrutiny of advanced AI models.

items.title_zh: AI代理變革工作方式，OpenAI發表研究論文
items.title_en: OpenAI Research Shows AI Agents Transforming Work Processes
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發表新研究論文指出AI代理正在革新工作方式，使員工能完成更長且複雜的任務，提升各職務的生產力。這展現AI代理從實驗階段進入實際應用的重要里程碑。
items.summary_en: OpenAI's new research demonstrates how AI agents are enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across multiple roles. This marks a significant milestone in moving AI agents from experimental to practical workplace applications.

items.title_zh: Anthropic控訴阿里巴巴進行史上最大Claude複製攻擊
items.title_en: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of Largest Claude Cloning Attack
items.summary_zh: AI安全公司Anthropic指控阿里巴巴使用25,000個帳戶在28.8百萬次交互中挖掘Claude，進行迄今為止最大規模的AI模型複製攻擊，要求對阿里巴巴進行懲罰。
items.summary_en: Anthropic claims Alibaba orchestrated the largest Claude cloning attack using 25,000 accounts across 28.8 million interactions to extract model capabilities. The company is calling for punishment against Alibaba for defying the Trump administration's policies.

items.title_zh: AI消費市場激戰，Claude挑戰ChatGPT主導地位
items.title_en: Anthropic's Claude Wins Over Paid Consumers Despite ChatGPT's Market Lead
items.summary_zh: 儘管ChatGPT在市場上保有絕對領先地位，但願意付費的消費者卻越來越偏好Anthropic的Claude，數據顯示Claude正在付費用戶市場蠶食ChatGPT的市場佔有。
items.summary_en: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers paying for AI services increasingly prefer Anthropic's Claude. Data shows Claude is gaining significant share in the lucrative paid consumer AI market previously dominated by OpenAI.

items.title_zh: 記憶體危機導致全球科技產品價格上漲
items.title_en: Global Tech Price Hikes Driven by Memory and Chip Cost Crisis
items.summary_zh: 蘋果、微軟Xbox等主要科技廠商因記憶體和晶片成本飆升而提高產品價格，成本較前期上漲超過2.5倍。蘋果憑其龐大採購量與利潤空間能短期吸收成本，但市場整體面臨嚴峻通膨壓力。
items.summary_en: Apple, Xbox, and other major tech companies are raising prices due to memory and storage costs surging over 2.5x previous levels. While Apple's scale allows temporary absorption, the industry faces significant cost pressure that threatens consumer affordability across all device categories.

items.title_zh: IBM推出全球首款0.7奈米晶片技術
items.title_en: IBM Unveils World's First 0.7nm Chip Technology with 3D Stacking
items.summary_zh: IBM宣布開發全球首款0.7奈米晶片技術，採用Nanostack 3D堆疊架構透過立體堆疊與異質材料整合提高效能與能效。IBM預估此技術最快5年內可導入1奈米以下製程節點。
items.summary_en: IBM announced the world's first 0.7nm chip technology featuring Nanostack 3D nanoscale transistor stacking architecture. Through vertical stacking and heterogeneous material integration, the technology doubles transistor density and could be deployed in sub-1nm nodes within 5 years.

items.title_zh: Notion Mail停止服務，AI代理成主流
items.title_en: Notion Discontinues Mail App as AI Agents Become Dominant
items.summary_zh: Notion宣布停止其電郵應用Notion Mail服務，原因是用戶越來越傾向將電郵管理交由AI代理處理。此決策反映AI代理技術已成為企業應用的核心趨勢。
items.summary_en: Notion is discontinuing its email app as users increasingly delegate inbox management to AI agents. This reflects how AI agents have become the dominant paradigm for email productivity, shifting user behavior away from traditional email interfaces.

items.title_zh: Android 17為可摺疊手機推出專用遊戲模式
items.title_en: Android 17 Introduces Dedicated Gaming Mode for Foldable Phones
items.summary_zh: Android 17推出可摺疊手機專用遊戲模式，在螢幕一半顯示虛擬遊戲控制器，讓手機摺疊遊戲更易操作。此功能預計數月內推出，展現系統層級支援遊戲優化的用心。
items.summary_en: Android 17 is introducing a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that overlays a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half the screen. Launching in coming months, this system-level feature aims to significantly improve foldable gaming experiences.

items.title_zh: Google發布Finance Android應用，重點聚焦AI功能
items.title_en: Google Launches Finance App for Android with AI-Powered Features
items.summary_zh: Google終於發布Finance Android應用，並承諾iOS版本將在2026年稍後推出。新應用全面融入AI功能，標誌Google在行動財經應用市場的重要回歸。
items.summary_en: Google finally releases the Finance app for Android after 20 years, with an iOS version promised later in 2026. The new app is packed with AI-powered features, marking Google's significant re-entry into the mobile finance app market.

items.title_en: YouTube Shorts Gets Closer to TikTok with Updated Features
items.summary_zh: YouTube為Shorts推出新的"清除螢幕"模式移除影片上的圖示與文字，並將豎起大拇指按鈕改為愛心圖示，新增加速播放選項。這些更新使Shorts更接近TikTok的使用體驗。
items.summary_en: YouTube updates Shorts with new features including a "clear screen" mode that removes UI elements, replaces thumbs-up with heart icons, and introduces double-speed playback. These changes bring Shorts closer to TikTok's user experience.

items.title_zh: Microsoft延長Windows 10延伸更新支援期限
items.title_en: Microsoft Extends Windows 10 Extended Update Program by One Year
items.summary_zh: 微軟宣布將Windows 10延伸更新計畫延長一年，因約四分之一的PC仍在使用這一上一代作業系統，顯示遷移至Windows 11仍面臨挑戰。
items.summary_en: Microsoft extends Windows 10's extended update program by another year, as approximately 25% of PCs still run the previous operating system, indicating slow migration rates to Windows 11.

items.title_zh: 委內瑞拉遭雙強震襲擊，至少188人喪生
items.title_en: Venezuela Struck by Twin Earthquakes Killing at Least 188 People
items.summary_zh: 委內瑞拉遭兩起規模7.2與7.5的強震襲擊，相隔一分鐘發生，造成至少188人喪命、超過1,520人受傷。美國宣布提供1.5億美元援助，首都卡拉卡斯周邊地區傷害最重。
items.summary_en: Two powerful earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 struck Venezuela a minute apart, killing at least 188 people and injuring over 1,520. The US announced $150 million in aid. Caracas and surrounding areas suffered the most severe damage from these shallow quakes.
items.source: BBC World / AP News / 中央社

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪加劇，英瑞刷新6月高溫紀錄
items.title_en: Europe Faces Record-Breaking June Heatwave Across Multiple Countries
items.summary_zh: 致命熱浪席捲西歐，英國與瑞士雙雙刷新6月高溫紀錄，德國周末高溫將破40度，荷蘭發布罕見高溫警報。極端高溫已對交通運輸與醫療體系造成嚴峻挑戰。
items.summary_en: Record-breaking heatwave grips Western Europe as UK and Switzerland set June temperature records. Germany faces temperatures exceeding 40°C this weekend while the Netherlands issues rare extreme heat warnings. The crisis is straining transportation and emergency medical services across the region.

items.title_zh: 美國最高法院准許終止海地敘利亞移民保護身份
items.title_en: US Supreme Court Allows Trump to End Protected Status for Haitian and Syrian Immigrants
items.summary_zh: 美國最高法院裁定允許川普政府終止海地與敘利亞移民的臨時保護身份（TPS），為遣返數十萬長期居住美國的移民打開大門。此裁決可能對其他移民保護計畫產生廣泛影響。
items.summary_en: The US Supreme Court allows the Trump administration to end temporary protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants, paving the way to deport hundreds of thousands who have lived in the US for years. The ruling could have broader implications for other immigrant protection programs.
